top_signals.title: Aluminum Gains Despite Goldman Warning of Faster Supply Rebound
top_signals.summary: Aluminum rose from near a four-month low, even as Goldman Sachs Group Inc. warned that supply from Middle Eastern smelters is rebounding more quickly than expected.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Genesis trumps Regis with $3.9B takeover bid for Vault
top_signals.summary: Vault Minerals said its directors unanimously determined the new offer to be better than the all-stock agreement with Regis reached in May.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
